text.title: earned-value-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for earned-value-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Rebaselining monthly to maintain a "green" dashboard after each rough period.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each rebaseline resets the indices to 1.0, erasing the evidence of chronic underperformance. Cumulative drift becomes invisible, and the final overrun surprises everyone.

failure-mode.description: Letting the LLM compute EVM numbers from narrative inputs (e.g., "we spent about $55k and are roughly 40% done").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Narrative inputs introduce ambiguity; LLMs round inconsistently and may interpolate missing values. Only typed numeric inputs from the accounting system and objective DoD assessments are valid.

failure-mode.description: Reporting only one EAC scenario in the sponsor update.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A single EAC anchors expectations on the most likely (or most optimistic) case; three scenarios expose the range of risk and prevent overconfidence.
